formalWaiver.reason: Runtime-size thresholds remain warning-only for limited beta because dependency and chunk refactors are explicitly out of scope; WARN rows have owners and dates, and future release-blocking activation requires reviewed threshold policy change.
formalWaiver.acceptedRiskStatement: The warning-only runtime-size posture is formally accepted for limited beta and must not be represented as a release-blocking hard gate.

remediation.plan: Review route-level chunking or lazy-loading in a separate audited task before any release-blocking activation.
Track compressed JS trend and propose chunk ownership changes in a separate reviewed task.
Review CSS ownership and unused rules separately with UI regression coverage.
Review pdfjs-dist isolation only in a dedicated OCR/PDF regression task.
Review pdf-parse replacement only with deterministic parser and OCR regression evidence.
Review packet PDF dependency isolation only with packet/PDF regression evidence.

waivedRows.label: Docker OCR/PDF runtime package inventory
waivedRows.reason: Docker package byte sizes are not measurable from this source-only report; Poppler/Tesseract package names are inventoried and any future package change requires OCR/parser regression evidence.
waivedRows.acceptedRiskStatement: Source-only Docker OCR/PDF runtime byte size remains waived because packages are inventoried by name and any future package change requires OCR/parser regression proof.

unresolvedRisks: External alerting remains dry-run-only until live proof or accepted formal exclusion exists.
Production live scheduler operation is not enabled by default and is not production-evidenced by this command.
Physical purge/archive remains deferred; lifecycle tooling appends markers only.
Historical backfill remains dry-run/apply-guarded and cannot rehydrate records without sanitized summaries.

blockerClassifications.title: Disaster recovery
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized restore machine proof with isolated target, RPO/RTO, post-restore checks, cleanup, and rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: simulated restore proof represented as completed disaster recovery
template-only validation represented as completed restore evidence
real PII or raw credit reports
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a safe isolated restore target and rerun restore:machine-proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Production ingest runtime
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized production worker runtime machine proof with bounded queue processing, queue depth before/after, liveness, counts, cleanup, and stop/rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: production queue mutation without explicit production apply guards
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_PRODUCTION_WORKER_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a bounded safe canary/runtime proof and rerun production-worker:machine-proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Load/concurrency proof
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe load evidence with synthetic fixtures, throughput, latency, queue depth, packet PDF cache, DB pool, rate limiter, dashboard references, and zero provider calls.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED load represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
measured evidence against a production host
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run the bounded measured local or staging-safe baseline with synthetic fixtures and release-blocking thresholds; keep production load forbidden.

blockerClassifications.title: Packet PDF scaling
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that packet PDF cache misses are bounded by a synchronous envelope with duplicate collapse, timeout, overload failure evidence, send-route provider-free failure, cache hit behavior, invalidation behavior, and non-owner denial.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/packet-pdf-cache.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED cache-miss proof represented as production-at-scale proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep the bounded synchronous envelope evidence current; collect staged target-environment capacity evidence before making any production-at-scale claim.

blockerClassifications.title: Ingest cleanup/data safety
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that default failed-ingest cleanup is non-destructive, marks remediation-required state, preserves artifacts/tradelines/evidence, and keeps any retained destructive path explicitly confirmed and production-refusing.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep the retained destructive helper classified as guarded residual risk: it is not default, requires explicit confirmation, records lifecycle evidence, and refuses production-like environments.

blockerClassifications.title: Historical raw report bytes
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized raw report byte remediation machine proof with reliable DB connectivity, sanitized inventory, remediation policy verification, and no raw bytes or PII.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw base64, raw report text, PII, secrets, signed URLs, or database URLs in evidence
dry-run plan represented as completed remediation
operator acceptance without approval, backup acknowledgement, compatibility checks, and post-remediation counts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Provide reliable sanitized DB inventory and remediation attestation JSON inputs, then rerun the raw report machine proof commands.

blockerClassifications.title: Bureau communication storage
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Automated storage adapter proof for new bureau attachments plus compatibility proof for old inline records.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw attachment bytes in DB evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep list endpoints metadata-only and handle any legacy inline rows through an approved historical remediation plan.

blockerClassifications.title: Response operations maturity
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Operator-ready evidence for disabled live scheduler, backfill readiness, purge/archive readiness, dashboard/soak references, manual fallback, and unresolved alerting risk without enabling live operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep live scheduler default-off and use response ops readiness evidence to govern scheduler, backfill, purge/archive, dashboard, soak, and manual fallback controls without mutating production.

blockerClassifications.title: Observability/alerting
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized alerting machine proof with live synthetic delivery or an explicitly certifying formal exclusion allowed by repo policy.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED alert proof represented as live alert delivery
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_ALERTING_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON for live delivery or an approved certifying exclusion and rerun alerting:machine-proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Migration governance
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive migration governance machine proof showing no active temporary allowlist residuals, no expired allowlist, and no release-blocking findings.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-gate.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: policy closure while temporary runtime ensure allowlist entries remain active
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Convert or expire the remaining migration allowlist residuals, then rerun migrations:machine-proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Production deployment parity
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Workflow unit tests, current read-only production-safe probe evidence, rollback SHA and post-rollback health-check evidence, local/staging synthetic owner-denial evidence, and default-off production worker path evidence. Static proof is not runtime production proof.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep production probes read-only, keep seeded privacy smokes local/staging-only, and keep rollback evidence tied to rollback_sha plus post-rollback health checks before calling deployment parity complete.

blockerClassifications.title: OCR route-local validation shape
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: OCR shared upload-validation proof plus valid-fixture output-stability evidence.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep OCR validation aligned with shared upload boundaries and preserve valid PDF extraction output in regression tests.

blockerClassifications.title: Parser-test list sensitive field
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only parser-test list proof plus admin-only raw text detail/export proof.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw extracted text in list evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep parser-test list metadata-only; use admin-only get/export paths for raw extracted text workflows and keep UI detail hydration covered by tests.

blockerClassifications.title: Consumer signature list sensitive field
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only consumer-signature list proof plus owner/admin get-by-id signature data proof.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: signature image data in list evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep signature list metadata-only; use owner/admin get-by-id detail when signature image data is required.

blockerClassifications.title: Hidden-risk list semantics
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Design/evidence artifact for hidden-risk aggregate and stale-suppression semantics; full bounded pagination remains a separate UI/query task.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

blockerClassifications.title: DB pool pressure evidence
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record DB pool configured max, observed active/borrowed signal or explicit unavailable reason, latency, queue depth, dashboard references, and zero production DB targeting.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
production database target in measured evidence
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe load and record sanitized DB pool configured/observed signals or an explicit unavailable reason.

blockerClassifications.title: Rate limiter write pressure
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record bounded synthetic rate limiter accepted/rejected counts, write-pressure events, latency, zero real identifiers, and zero production mutation.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe rate-limit pressure using synthetic identifiers only; do not send production hostile traffic.

blockerClassifications.title: Runtime-size gates
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report plus accepted policy acceptance evidence. Warning-only closure must be an explicit formal waiver with governed WARN/WAIVED rows; release-blocking closure must have no exceeded thresholds.
forbiddenProofTypes: WARN rows without remediation owner/date or waiver reason
WAIVED rows without reason, owner, review/expiry date, and accepted-risk statement
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep the warning-only waiver evidence current, and only enable a release-blocking gate through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.
blockerClassifications.waiverReason: Runtime-size policy remains warning-only under a formal limited-beta waiver with governed WARN rows; no dependency, chunking, build behavior, or OCR/PDF changes were made.

blockerClassifications.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

blockerClassifications.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Current local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus explicit read-only production probe limits. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof and unauthenticated probes alone are insufficient.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes, local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke, and production deployment parity evidence; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Ingest observability release gating
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Release evidence capture records exact commands, production worker readiness evidence, dashboard skips, and explicit dashboard-PASS limitations.
forbiddenProofTypes: release gate changes in this framework
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep exact release evidence commands visible in production-scale evidence, production deployment parity evidence, production worker readiness evidence, response ops readiness evidence, alert exclusion validation, promotion pack output, and operator dashboard semantics; dashboard PASS alone is not release evidence.

blockerClassifications.title: Retention archive/restore proof
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized retention archive/restore machine proof with safe archive candidate, isolated restore target, integrity, cleanup, and rollback notes.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a safe retention archive/restore proof and rerun retention:archive-restore-machine-proof.

blockerClassifications.title: Public routes inventory risk
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

blockerClassifications.title: Documentation drift
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.

blockerClassifications.title: Dashboard default SKIP semantics
blockerClassifications.proofTypeRequired: Dashboard and promotion-pack reports distinguish PASS, FAIL, SKIP, SIMULATED, and HUMAN_REQUIRED while recording exact commands, skipped checks, and dashboard PASS limitation.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockerClassifications.recommendedNextAction: Keep release evidence labeled by exact commands and visible SKIP/SIMULATED/HUMAN_REQUIRED rows, not dashboard headline status; promotion pack validation must fail if SKIP is treated as PASS.

readinessClassification.reason: Critical/high, machine-required, simulated-only, human-required, partial, or open blockers remain.

requiredStatements: SIMULATED proof is not production proof.
Dashboard PASS alone is not complete release evidence when checks are skipped.
Historical raw report remediation requires accepted sanitized operator evidence.
Disaster recovery closure requires accepted sanitized production restore evidence; staging restore evidence is not production proof.
Machine-attested production evidence can close production blockers only when non-interactive, sanitized, current, and CERTIFYING:true.
Measured load evidence must be local or staging-safe, threshold-passing, synthetic, and zero-provider-call only.
Staging ingest worker queue-drain evidence is staging proof only and does not activate production.
Migration governance requires a non-mutating production promotion gate; CERTIFYING remains false while temporary runtime ensure allowlist entries are active.
Runtime-size closure requires accepted hard-gate policy evidence or an accepted warning-only formal waiver.
Response operations readiness requires exact scheduler, backfill, purge/archive, alerting, dashboard, and soak evidence commands.
Codex must not promote readiness classification beyond the evidence in this pack.
